title: Cleisostoma muticum
intro: Cleisostoma muticum, also known as Muticumedusa, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia, recognized by its unique, fragrant flowers and slender stems. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including the treatment of fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. Studies have identified the bioactive constituents of Cleisostoma muticum to include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its effects and promote well-being.
